basic_details.job_title: VNSGU Associate Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. degree in the relevant field and First class or equivalent at either Bachelor’s or Master’s level in the relevant branch, At least total 6 research publications in SCI journals / UGC / AICTE approved list of journals, Minimum of 8 years of experience in teaching / research / industry out of which at least 2 years shall be Post Ph.D. experience
qualification.details: Ph.D. degree in the relevant field. First class or equivalent at either Bachelor’s or Master’s level in the relevant branch. At least a total of 6 research publications in SCI journals / UGC / AICTE approved list of journals. Minimum of 8 years of experience in teaching / research / industry, out of which at least 2 years shall be Post Ph.D. experience.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of VNSGU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download VNSGU Associate Professor Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the VNSGU Associate Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Associate Professor position at Veer Narmad South Gujarat University is 21st June 2026. Ensure all submissions are completed by this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Associate Professor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. degree in the relevant field, with a First Class or equivalent at Bachelor's or Master's level. Additionally, a minimum of 6 research publications and 8 years of experience are required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Associate Professor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Associate Professor role will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 131,400 to Rs. 217,100.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Associate Professor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Associate Professor position announced by Veer Narmad South Gujarat University in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the VNSGU Associate Professor recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the provided link to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this Associate Professor position?
faq.answer: The Associate Professor position at Veer Narmad South Gujarat University is offered on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Veer Narmad South Gujarat University located?
faq.answer: Veer Narmad South Gujarat University is located in Surat, Gujarat, with the pincode 395007.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Associate Professor recruitment at VNSGU is GAD/SFP/T/Emp.Notice/11404/2026.

faq.question: Q10. What is the minimum experience required for the Associate Professor role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 8 years of experience in teaching, research, or industry is required, with at least 2 years specifically being Post Ph.D. experience.
